elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} Put a card from your hand in Reserve.
Target Character switches Expeditions. (It leaves its Expedition and joins its controller's other Expedition.)  #Draw a card.#
[Cooldown].  [Resupply].
When I go to Reserve from anywhere — Exhaust me ({T}). (Exhausted cards can't be played and have no Support abilities.)  {H} Send me to Reserve.
If I would leave the Expedition zone, you may put me in my owner's Mana zone instead (as an exhausted Mana Orb).
#{J} [Resupply].#  Your Characters have: " {R} I gain 1 boost."
{H} You may have me gain [[Fleeting]]. If you do, another target Character gains 1 boost.
When I gain 1 or more boosts — You may exhaust ({T}) target card in Reserve. (Exhausted cards can't be played and have no Support abilities.)  #{J}# I gain 1 boost.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Return another card from your Reserve to your hand. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: #Se stai per tirare un dado, puoi aggiungere 1 al risultato.# (Scegli dopo aver visto il risultato.)
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : The next card you play this turn costs {1} less. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {J} If you have two or more cards in Reserve, I gain 1 boost and [[Fleeting]]. (If I would be sent to Reserve, discard me instead.)
[Cooldown]. (If I go to Reserve after my effect resolves, exhaust me {T}.)  Exchange target #card# in your Reserve with a card from your hand.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains [[Anchored]]. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} #Each player# draws a card.
{J} [Resupply]. (Put the top card of your deck in Reserve.)  If an [[Anchored]] Character would leave my Expedition during the Afternoon, it loses [[Anchored]] instead.
My region #and the region of the Expedition facing me# are {V} #and lose their other terrains.#
{H} [Sabotage].
When my Expedition fails to move forward during Dusk — [Sabotage] after Rest.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in target Expedition.# (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: [[Fleeting]].  Send to Reserve target Character with no statistic over 3.

#[Cooldown].# (If I go to Reserve after my effect resolves, exhaust me {T}.)  Choose one. If each of your Expeditions is behind or tied, you may choose both:  • Draw a card.  • Create an [Ordis Recruit 1/1/1] Soldier token in target Expedition.
{H} [Sabotage].
{H} I gain #3 boosts#.

[Cooldown]. (If I go to Reserve after my effect resolves, exhaust me {T}. Exhausted cards can't be played and have no Support abilities.)  Create a [Mana Moth 2/2/2] Illusion token in target Expedition.
When you sacrifice a non-Illusion Character — Create a [MANA_MOTH] Illusion token in my Expedition.  {J} Sacrifice a Character in my Expedition.
